rationale: Educ. Code §29.081 governs compensatory and accelerated instruction for at-risk students. It references funding under §48.104 but does not tie to or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct statutory conflict exists.
quote: A district that is required to provide accelerated instruction under Subsection (b-1) shall separately budget sufficient funds, including funds under Section 48.104, for that purpose.
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district budgets from reduced property tax revenue is not a statutory conflict with this section's operative text.
